events.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
events.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez, known for hits like 'Jenny from the Block' and 'On The Floor', celebrates her 57th birthday today.

angles.name: J.Lo's Legacy
angles.copy: From Fly Girl to global icon, J.Lo has been soundtracking our lives for decades. What's your ultimate Jennifer Lopez track?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Icon
angles.copy: Still got the moves like Jagger! Wishing a very happy 83rd birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger. Which Stones track defines him for you?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV launched with its iconic first music video, The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star', changing the landscape of music and television forever.

angles.name: The Day The Music Changed
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV arrived and music was never the same. What's your favourite music video of all time?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which went on to become one of the fastest-selling debut albums in UK history.

angles.name: Definitely a Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and kickstarted a new era of British rock. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival turns 57
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Three Days of Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million gathered for Woodstock. Which iconic performance from the festival would you have loved to see live?

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, would have been 91
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, 49 years on. His music and legacy continue to inspire generations. What's your go-to Elvis track?

events.title: Tupac Shakur, would have been 55
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic passing of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who was shot in Las Vegas and died on September 13, 1996. He would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Remembering a Rap Legend
angles.copy: 30 years since we lost Tupac Shakur, a voice that defined a generation. His impact on music and culture is undeniable.

events.title: Jimi Hendrix, would have been 84
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix on September 18, 1970, who would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Guitar God Remembered
angles.copy: 56 years ago, the world lost a musical pioneer. Remembering Jimi Hendrix, whose legendary guitar work continues to inspire. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring classic tracks and that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Walking Into History
angles.copy: It's 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those songs... pure genius. Which track is on repeat for you?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The inimitable Chrissie Hynde, lead singer of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders' Powerhouse
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the rock 'n' roll legend, Chrissie Hynde! What's your favourite Pretenders song?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The iconic voice of Oasis and solo artist, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Mad For It!
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite tune from the man himself, be it Oasis or solo?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released on his album of the same name on September 9, 1971 (US), becoming a global call for peace.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates deeply today. What does 'Imagine' mean to you?

events.title: The first iPod launched 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music and putting '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago, Apple changed the game and put our entire music library in our pockets. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the very first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic gadgets to unforgettable theme songs, which era of 007 is your favourite?

events.title: John Lennon, would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering the legendary John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: A Timeless Voice
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the incredible John Lennon. His music and message live on.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian, actor, and writer, John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! What's your favourite Monty Python sketch or Fawlty Towers moment?

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', was released on November 22, 1968, showcasing their diverse musical directions.

angles.name: The White Album's Influence
angles.copy: 58 years since The Beatles released their sprawling 'White Album'. A true masterpiece of musical experimentation. What's your standout track?
